raw_text:
HAUGHTY BUT GRACIOUS
Although they can be haughty, elves are generally gracious
even to those who fali short of their high expectations-
which is most non.elves. 5till, they can find good in just
about anyone.
Dwarves. "Dwarves are dull, c1umsy oafs. But what they
lack humor, sophistication, and manners, they make up in
in
valor. And I must admit, their best smiths produce art that
approaches elven quality."
Haljlings. "Halflings are people of simple pleasures, and
that is not a quality to scorn. lhey're good folk, they care
for each other and tend their gardens, and they have proven
themselves tougher than they seem when the need arises."
Humans. "Alithat haste, ambition and drive to
their
accomplish something before their brieflives pass away-
human endeavors seem 50 futile sometimes. But
then
you look at what they have accomplished, and you have to
appreciate their achievements. If only they could slow down
and learn some refinement."
~

data.description: You can add 1 to the Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) or Dexterity (Stealth) check you make to fire a ranged weapon while moving. You can move up to double your speed while taking the Disengage action.

Elves reach adulthood at the same age as humans, but their understanding of adulthood goes beyond physical growth to encompass the world. They typically experience more during their years and aod Ao adults often name themselves around the age of 100. Elves can live up to 750 years old.
